Dec 4, 2025 • 8JJ Sports

The Catch That Stopped the Match It was Tilak Verma who stole the spotlight with an act of sheer athleticism

His athleticism and timing turned a tense moment into a show-stealing highlight, leaving fans replaying the catch worldwide.
